title: Hazbin Hotel items
description:
Mod that adds some Hazbin Hotel items,
some items like Doors of the series, pillars of the hotel & more things to create the hotel of hazbin hotel
body:
![LOGO](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b59030898fd2eebfdcfa3d5223d4372cd610fb01.png)
Mod that adds some Hazbin Hotel items,
 some items like Doors of the series, pillars of the hotel & more things to create the hotel of hazbin hotel

 ![items mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/586be48501775ccfc8d85eb4477537ffee7b6a42.png)

 MORE INFO [Web Official ](https://sites.google.com/view/hazbin-hotel-mod/)
